title: 流式响应应通过 stream_options.include_usage 返回 usage

messages.content: Stream one short sentence about usage accounting.

expect.notes: MiniMax docs mention stream_options but child behavior needs real validation; this case diagnoses include_usage usage chunks. Current MiniMax-M2.7 responses include token, character, and prompt cache usage, but not completion_tokens_details.reasoning_tokens for this non-reasoning probe.
